title: CARDFIGHT!! VANGUARD Divinez DELUXE Arc
titleNative: カードファイト!! ヴァンガード Divinez デラックス編
synopsis: The third season of Cardfight!! Vanguard: Divinez. After the conclusion of the Destined Showdown, Akina and the other Vanguard fighters are enjoying their peaceful days when a missive arrives. It is an invitation to "DELUXE", the tournament to determine the strongest Vanguard fighter! The third iteration of the tournament is packed with must-see matchups produced by AI Gui, featuring the miraculous return of Michiru Hazama, and the legendary strongest fighter of Mythisch, Kagetsu Yakumo. And in the midst of this tournament, Akina is faced with a question posed to him by Nao's mentor Kagetsu: "What is your reason for playing Vanguard?" What is the meaning behind this question? And how will Akina respond? The quest for the pinnacle of DELUXE begins now! (Source: cf-vanguard.com)

title: Uchuu Senkan Yamato Movie (Provisional Title)
titleNative: 宇宙戦艦ヤマト（仮）
synopsis: At the 50th anniversary screening attended by Hideaki Anno, Yutaka Izubuchi and Ryuusuke Hikawa, it was announced that Studio Khara was granted rights to produce a new anime movie based on Space Battleship Yamato starting in 2025. Anno revealed that his studio acquired rights for the franchise and the soundtrack and that he is now able to create a new work. Note: Title and relations are provisional and subject to change.

title: Yuan Yuan He Ji Qi Ren
titleRomaji: Yuan Yuan He Ji Qi Ren
titleNative: 园园和机器人
synopsis: The story takes place among a group of toys: the naughty Yuanyuan lost the shuttlecocks of two girls. In order to compensate for the shuttlecocks, he found chicken feathers. With the help of the robot, he caught a rooster, plucked the feathers and gave them to the little girls as compensation, but the two girls lost their shuttlecocks. The girl thought she shouldn't take the feathers, so she gave them back to the rooster. [Source: baike.baidu.com]

titleNative: まぼろしまぼちゃん
synopsis: Mabo-chan goes on a world-wide journey to find a cure after his parents were turned to stone after eating an apple infected with a mysterious bacteria.

title: Kaiketsu Zorori no Dragon Taiji
titleNative: かいけつゾロリ
synopsis: The first anime adaptation of the Kaiketsu Zorori franchise. It adapted 3 of the picture book's stories. A 2nd OVA was planned to cover 3 more books but it was postponed and eventually cancelled.

title: Da-yoshi P Produce: Ashita no Jobuubu

titleNative: だーよしPプロデュース あしたのジョブーブ

Daiyoshi P Produce Ashita no Jobuubu
synopsis: A collaboration between Taka no Tsume and the Town Work, an employment office whose mascot is a pig called Jobuubu (a play on words of "job" and the Japanese onomatopoeia sounds a pig makes).

title: The Mononoke Lecture Logs of Chuzenji-sensei: He Just Solves All the Mysteries
titleRomaji: Chuuzenji-sensei Mononoke Kougiroku: Sensei ga Nazo wo Toiteshimau kara.
titleEnglish: The Mononoke Lecture Logs of Chuzenji-sensei: He Just Solves All the Mysteries
titleNative: 中禅寺先生物怪講義録　先生が謎を解いてしまうから。
synonyms: The Mononoke Lecture Logs of Chuzenji-sensei: He Just Solves All the Mysteries
synopsis: Our setting is in Tokyo in 1948, just right after the war. Kanna Kusakabe had just become a second-year at a high school when she meets the new language teacher, Akihiko Chuuzenji. Mysterious supernatural things keep happening around Kanna. Once again today, Kanna is going to open the doors to the library prep room to seek help from the surly Chuuzenji-sensei who is waiting inside. A high school supernatural mystery featuring the unlikely duo between a teacher and a high school girl is about to begin! (Source: Pony Canyon, edited)

title: POKÉTOON (2024)
titleNative: POKÉTOON (2024)
synonyms: Is there a mass outbreak of Clodsire?
Lucky Safari de o ni go Kko!?
パモパモットパーモット
怒りのオコリザル観察日記
ドオー大量発生ちゅう？
ラッキーなサファリでおにごっこ！？
Romanticスパイス カプサイジ伝説
synopsis: Short episodes released on the Pokémon Official YouTube Channel. Episodes: #1: Pawmi, Pawmo, Pawmot! / Pamo, Pamotto, Parmot! (パモパモットパーモット), released September 18, 2024. #2: Angry Primeape Observation Diary / Ikari no Okorizaru Kansatsu Nikki (怒りのオコリザル観察日記), released September 25, 2024. #3: Is there a mass outbreak of Clodsire? / Dooh Tairyou Hasseichuu? (ドオー大量発生ちゅう？), released October 2, 2024. #4: Riding on Gogoat / Gougouto ni Notte (ゴーゴートに乗って), released October 9, 2024. #5: I Love Ducklett! / Koaruhii Daisuki! (コアルヒーだいすき！), released October 16, 2024. #6: Chansey Safari Tag!? / Lucky Safari de o ni go Kko!? (ラッキーなサファリでおにごっこ！？), released October 23, 2024. #7: Romantic Spice - Capsakid Legend / Romantic Spice - Capsaiji Densetsu (Romanticスパイス カプサイジ伝説). released October 30, 2024. #8: Childhood Friend Charcadet / Osananajimi no Carbou (幼なじみのカルボウ), released November 20, 2024 #9: Midnight Adventure with Murkrow / Yamikarasu to Mayonaka no Bouken (ヤミカラスと真夜中のぼうけん), released February 14, 2025
